modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to install Word add-in after Office 365 upgrade.

full_description_text:  
User attempted to install an add-in for Microsoft Word.  
This action was initiated post-upgrade to Office 365.  
An error message was encountered: "Sorry, Office 365 has been configured to prevent individual acquisition of Office Add-ins."  
The configuration settings appear to restrict the installation process, leading to this impediment.
